positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial botanical illustration featuring interwoven golden mandalas, stylized glowing bioluminescent jungle flora, and minimalist astronomical elements like crescent moons and nebula dust. The composition is centered, ideal for apparel printing, with bold outlines and sharp contrast. Use a vibrant, deep indigo and emerald green color palette, accented by metallic gold inks. Style should emulate intricate linework mixed with modern vector art, achieving a seamless, graphic, repeating motif. Clean silhouette, maximalist detail, high contrast, print-ready design.
negative: blurry, low detail, ugly, distorted, text, signature, watermark, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, out of frame, messy, gradient color transition
